title: Food flood
description: This mod adds different food to your game! It has new achievements, food, items, blocks. You can see berries, french fries, caramel in the mod.
body:
This mod adds different food to your game! It has new achievements like "What do champions want?", food like french fries and berries, items like flour and dough, blocks like fridge and deep fryer. I will be adding more food soon! I hope you will enjoy! Good luck with the mod!

In the next update there will be new food and food drop from the goat will be added
